title: Rei and Kaworu understanding of human kind
display_title: Rei and Kaworu understanding of human kind
wikitext:
[]: Rei and Kaworu understanding of human kind             Quote Post by Coren » Thu Apr 10, 2014 6:51 am Hi everybody, I am new of this forum, but in these days, thanks to a NGE rewatch, I've been lurking a lot :). My question is very simple, why Kaworu, who is mother of Angelic breed, seems to have a very good understanding of human culture and feelings while Rei, who is mother of Human breed seems not to understand anything at all. Ok, she's get better throughout the series, but still the difference is huge.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Apr 10, 2014 2:11 pm One of them was raised by a religious cabal with a vested interest in training them to be as human as possible for the sake of subterfuge. The other one was raised by a person who had literally no use for them on an intellectual level outside of doing what she was told, and has replaced them literally twice-over, giving them no social interaction outside of minimal amounts of school. Makes a bit more sense, doesn't it?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Apr 10, 2014 2:18 pm Aura's hit it smack on the nose. Really not much more I can say at the moment.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Thu Apr 10, 2014 2:59 pm Rei is an alien being torn between crushing ennui and a desire to be human. Kaworu is a thing wearing a person suit.

[]:             Quote Post by Coren » Thu Apr 10, 2014 3:30 pm Kaworu is a thing wearing a person suit.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Apr 10, 2014 3:41 pm Chuckman wrote: Rei is an alien being torn between crushing ennui and a desire to be human. Kaworu is a thing wearing a person suit.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Apr 10, 2014 4:41 pm Kendrix wrote: When you take a closer look, Kaworu's knowledge isn't all that deep.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Thu Apr 10, 2014 5:14 pm pwhodges wrote: Manga!Kaworu shows this clearly and is aware of it, and indeed expresses curiosity about human relationships.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Apr 10, 2014 5:23 pm I'm not sure they're so different, even though he's given much more space in the manga (possibly because they realised he had given too little space in the series).

My question is very simple, why Kaworu, who is mother of Angelic breed, seems to have a very good understanding of human culture and feelings while Rei, who is mother of Human breed seems not to understand anything at all.
